CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Requesting Default Judgment Against Deft; Request For Court'S Judgment; Statement Of Case In Support Of Request For Default Judgment Against Deft
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Kris Case, CSR#13142. Telephone 25 998 0880. (514)

Anthony R. Rossmiller, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff,
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JIMMY LEE, DBA GONG YAU ROOFING COMPANY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness: Richard Mo sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $50,598.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $480.55
Total Judgment in the amount of $51,078.55, plus interest after judgment at the legal rate.
Judgment signed in open court.
